description_long: This is a rustic log cabin with a prominent, deep red, multi-gabled roof and natural wood log walls. The structure features a stone foundation and a covered front porch, adding to its inviting appearance. Large overhanging eaves and exposed beams are visible, providing both shade and architectural interest. The windows are rectangular and arranged asymmetrically, with a cluster on one side and a single window on the other. A stone chimney protrudes from the roof, suggesting a fireplace inside. The cabin's overall design is robust and cozy, suitable for residential use in a natural or suburban setting.
description: A rustic log cabin with a deep red, multi-gabled roof, stone foundation, and covered porch, featuring asymmetrical windows and a stone chimney.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, covered porch, and the central gabled roof with a visible stone chimney.
description_view_1: Angled view highlighting the front porch, the depth of the roof overhangs, and the side extension of the cabin.
description_view_2: Rear or side view displaying the long log wall, stone foundation, and a cluster of windows with a visible porch on the right.
description_view_3: Back view focusing on the rear gable, the extension of the roof, and the absence of visible doors or windows.
attribute_roof_type: multi-gabled roof with deep overhangs, constructed from metal or shingle material, featuring a prominent central gable and intersecting side gables
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical arrangement with a cluster of rectangular windows on one side and a single window on the other, all medium-sized and horizontally aligned
attribute_door_placement: single main door centered on the front facade beneath the porch roof
